texto: I saw the patterns of history and thought that a human might be eighty per cent chemicals, eighteen per cent his past, and two per cent feeling, creatures of habit. Which makes psychiatrists really pharmacists who have to listen longer.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Gerard Donovan sobre temas ligados a desenvolvimento pessoal. A afirmação “I saw the patterns of history and thought that a human might be eighty per cent chemicals, eighte…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a desenvolvimento-pessoal, human, psychiatrists, útil em momentos de psychiatrists.

frase_original: I saw the patterns of history and thought that a human might be eighty per cent chemicals, eighteen per cent his past, and two per cent feeling, creatures of habit. Which makes psychiatrists really pharmacists who have to listen longer.

texto: The shovel worked in and out of the light beams as the dirt hit him in the stomach, on his back, fell into his ears, his eyes, as I covered him along with the things that had made him: his walks, his rest, his eating when hungry, the stars he watched sometimes, the first day I brought him home, the first time he saw snow, and every second of his friendship, what he took with him into silence and stillness ...
explicacao: Citação de Gerard Donovan sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “The shovel worked in and out of the light beams as the dirt hit him in the stomach, on his back, …” articula amizade, dogs, funeral em registro de amizade, com relevância para contextos como luto e reflexao-noturna.
